requirement.description: The gateway shall immediately forward the brake warning signal when it becomes active.

test_cases.title: Verify GW_BrakeWarning message transmission
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Gateway ECU powered; monitor CAN ID 0x110
steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_BrakeWarning message
test_cases.expected_result: GW_BrakeWarning message is present on the CAN bus

test_cases.title: Verify brake warning inactive state is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; brake warning inactive; monitor CAN ID 0x110
steps: Ensure brake warning input is inactive

test_cases.title: Verify brake warning active state is forwarded immediately
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; brake warning inactive; monitor CAN ID 0x110
steps: Monitor CAN bus for next GW_BrakeWarning message
test_cases.expected_result: BrakeWarningActive = 1 transmitted immediately in the next message

test_cases.title: Verify brake warning deactivation is forwarded correctly
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; brake warning active; monitor CAN ID 0x110

test_cases.title: Verify brake warning does not toggle without input change
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; brake warning stable; monitor CAN ID 0x110

test_cases.title: Verify GW_BrakeWarning message DLC
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; CAN monitoring enabled; monitor CAN ID 0x110

test_cases.title: Verify brake warning is transmitted immediately on activation (no delay)
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; brake warning inactive; monitor CAN ID 0x110
steps: Measure time to first GW_BrakeWarning with active status
test_cases.expected_result: BrakeWarningActive = 1 is transmitted in the first available CAN frame
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_brk_007_immediate_forwarding(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_BRAKE_WARNING_ID, 1)
    assert msgs, 'No GW_BrakeWarning messages received'
    assert decode_brake_warning(msgs[-1]) in (0, 1)

test_cases.title: Verify GW_BrakeWarning message stops transmitting when Gateway ECU is powered OFF
test_cases.precondition: Gateway ECU active; monitor CAN ID 0x110
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_brk_008_stop_on_power_off(can_bus):
    msgs_before = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_BRAKE_WARNING_ID, 2)
    assert msgs_before, 'No GW_BrakeWarning before power off'
    time.sleep(3)
    msgs_after = collect_messages(can_bus, GW_BRAKE_WARNING_ID, 2)
    assert not msgs_after
